ogTitle: Kangaroo Point vs Kangaroobie: Climate Safety

heading: Kangaroo Point vs Kangaroobie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kangaroo Point, New South Wales and Kangaroobie, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kangaroobie has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kangaroo Point (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kangaroo Point or Kangaroobie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Point has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Kangaroobie scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kangaroo Point scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Kangaroobie scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kangaroo Point or Kangaroobie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kangaroobie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
